hero.title: Boost Your Steam
hero.subtitle: Cloud-based Steam hour boosting with advanced features. No PC required, 24/7 uptime, and bank-level security. Start boosting in minutes.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need
features.description: Easily farm cards, rack up hours, and control your Steam appearance with our comprehensive toolkit.
features.customTitleDesc: Display any in-game name on Steam, real or made-up, and stand out. Perfect for customizing your profile.
features.gameLimitDesc: You can boost up to 32 games at once. This lets you efficiently increase playtime across multiple games simultaneously.
features.cardFarmerDesc: Automatically farm all remaining trading card drops from your games. Earn cards while you idle.
features.alwaysOnDesc: Keep idling hours even when your PC is off. No need to keep your PC on - our cloud workers handle everything.
features.customAppearanceDesc: Choose how you show up on Steam - stay visible or go incognito while boosting hours.
features.awayMessageDesc: Set an auto-reply that sends a custom message to anyone who messages you while you're boosting.
features.autoRestartDesc: Automatically restarts your hour boosting when you quit a game on Steam, ensuring continuous progress.
features.autoFriendDesc: Optionally automatically accept all incoming friend requests while your boost is running.

pricing.title: Steam Hour Boosting
pricing.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your needs. Upgrade or downgrade anytime.

settings.generalDesc: Update your Avatar, Username or Email.
settings.panelDesc: Modify your panel to your liking
settings.unlockPremiumDesc: Unlock premium features by using a different plan
settings.customInGameTitleDesc: Display custom in-game status, real or made-up
settings.customAwayMessageDesc: Auto-Reply message for when you're boosting
settings.appearanceDesc: Set your status and display mode
settings.hideActivityDesc: Hides last 3 recent played games from profile
settings.autoRestartDesc: Resumes boosting after you're done playing a game
settings.autoFriendDesc: Automatically accept all incoming friend requests
settings.autoStopDesc: Auto-stop your plan after boosting a set amount of hours
settings.cardFarmerDesc: Idle all remaining card drops across your games

referrals.title: Referrals
referrals.subtitle: Invite friends and earn rewards
referrals.howItWorks: For every 3 referred users who purchase an upgrade, you'll earn 1 Basic Plan. You can claim each plan with the "Claim Reward" button once you qualify.
referrals.step1Desc: Copy your unique referral URL and share it with friends
referrals.step2Desc: They create an account using your referral link
referrals.step3Desc: When they purchase a plan, it counts towards your rewards
referrals.step4Desc: For every 3 paid referrals, claim a free Basic Plan

footer.description: Cloud-based Steam hour boosting platform. Secure, fast, and reliable.
